headline: 25 Stocks That Could Rally 45% or More
summary: Analysts say these S&P 500 stocks have at least 45% price upside over the next year or so.

headline: Can T-Mobile Sustain Its Strong Customer Growth Momentum?
summary: TMUS is expanding its wireless and broadband customer base, raising its 2026 guidance as ARPA rises and gains in 5G and broadband continue amid intense telecom competition.

headline: Franklin Access Launches RG3100 5G Mobile Router Hotspot on T-Mobile’s Advanced 5G Network
summary: Next-generation mobile router hotspot combines 5G-Advanced ready performance, Wi-Fi 7, Gigabit per Second Ethernet and enterprise management in a compact portable designSAN DIEGO, June 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Franklin Access (NASDAQ: FKWL), a leader in broadband and wireless communications solutions, today announced the launch of the new Franklin RG3100 5G Mobile Router Hotspot, now available on T-Mobile’s nationwide 5G network. headline: Deutsche Telekom shares slide as CEO pushes to merge with T-Mobile US
summary: Investing.com -- Deutsche Telekom shares slid more than 3% on Thursday after the Wall Street Journal reported that the German telecoms giant is pushing to merge with its U.S. subsidiary T-Mobile.
